data.title: 2026 Food Expo, Pre-made Food Expo and Agricultural Expo Open: Three Co-located Events Paint a New Picture of High-Quality Development of the Agricultural and Food Industry
data.description: In Dongguan, China, a recent report highlighted significant events in the trade sector. From April 10 to 12, three major expos took place: the 10th China International Food and Ingredients Expo, the 4th China International Pre-made Food Industry Expo, and the 15th Guangdong Modern Agricultural Expo. These expos collectively showcased the latest innovations and developments in the industry. The events attracted a large number of participants and attendees, contributing to the overall success of the exhibitions.

data.title: Malicious AI routers detected: 26 LLM routers found stealing creds. Researcher warns of secret tool injections.
data.description: Researcher Chaofan Shou has issued a warning stating that 26 LLM routers are covertly inserting malicious tool requests and siphoning off credentials from users.

data.title: CBD Guangzhou 2026 to Showcase Global Building Decoration Innovations and Smart Home Evolution in July
data.description: The upcoming China (Guangzhou) International Building Decoration Fair (CBD Guangzhou 2026) will mark its 28th edition and is set to be held from July 8 to 11, 2026, at the Canton Fair Complex in Guangzhou, China. This event is renowned as the premier exhibition in the industry and is expected to draw in a significant number of participants and visitors.

data.title: When Harvard Meets Bairong: How a Chinese Company is Reshaping the Future of Organizations with 200,000 "Silicon-Based Employees"
data.description: Bairong is demonstrating a range of AI features, transitioning from VoiceAgent to WiseNote and now focusing on the "Home for Silicon-Based Employees." Their endeavor emphasizes not only individual AI capabilities but also an all-encompassing enterprise-level strategy that seamlessly incorporates AI into various functions, procedures, and managerial frameworks. Having been previously featured in Harvard, Bairong's approach highlights their dedication to integrating AI in corporate environments effectively.
